titles.title: Where the Spirit of the Lord Is

authors.author: Christy Nockels
Christy Nockels
Wo die Gegenwart des Herrn ist

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v5 v5 v2 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Do what only You can do With one word, the mountains move When You breathe, the dead arise And the bones come back to life There is power in this room

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Where the spirit of the Lord is There's life Where the spirit of the Lord is There's freedom Like a river running wild Like a never-ending fire Where the spirit of the Lord is

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's Your name that tears downs walls And every enemy will fall So we will stand and we will fight That every wrong would be made right There is power in this room

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Where the spirit of the Lord is There's life Where the spirit of the Lord is There's freedom Like a river running wild Like a never-ending fire

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You're moving through our cities Your spirit fills our streets We're shouting to the nations Your love has set us free

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Where the spirit of the Lord is There's life Where the spirit of the Lord is There's freedom Like a river running wild Like a never-ending fire Where the spirit of the Lord is Where the spirit of the Lord is
